candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A line, but it appears as a component beneath the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold'. The figures reconcile with the broader cost total, indicating the selected COGS row already includes this amount.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is [Income Statement] Cost of goods sold. The separate D&A line is a sub-component of that total, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This row appears under 'Selling expenses' and also under 'Administrative costs' as a component-level D&A line. In both cases, the selected parent rows are the totals, which already include these D&A amounts.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is the D&A component under the selected total row 'Research and development costs'. Since 'Research and development costs' is already included in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, this R&D D&A should not be added separately.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA reference bucket is the sum of 'Selling expenses', 'Administrative costs', and 'Research and development costs'. Each visible D&A row sits beneath one of those selected totals and appears embedded in them. Adding any of these rows separately would double count. The R&D D&A is especially excluded because the parent R&D total is already handled through both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
